nodes.label: Hybrid AI Decision Engine.     Primary: Gemini 2.5 Flash via Google Generative
Load comma-separated API keys from GEMINI_API_KEYS env var.
Rotate to next API key in the pool.
Detect mode: live (Gemini API) or mock (rule-based).
Main entry point: analyze market data and return trading decision.          Ar
Call Gemini 2.5 Flash for trading decision with rolling key rotation.
Build concise prompt from market snapshot (~500 tokens).
Parse Claude's JSON response into decision dict.
Ensure decision has all required fields and valid values.
Rule-based mock decision engine.         Uses the same feature inputs as Claude
Log every decision to SQLite for audit trail.
General-purpose analysis for the AI Insights frontend panel.          Args:
Use Gemini for general context analysis.
Generate mock insights based on context and data values.
